visual_analysis: The application features a clean layout with a modern aesthetic, utilizing a cohesive color scheme and engaging typography. The visual elements are well-organized, although some areas could benefit from reduced information density for clearer communication.
educational_analysis: While the main educational concept—Big-Theta notation—is clearly presented, the complexity of the text may challenge some learners. The graph provides a relevant visual aid, but additional instructional elements or context could enhance understanding and clarify learning objectives.
